summary.en: An AI agent that accelerates investment research—screening, modeling, and coverage updates—by turning natural language into analyst-grade insights and artifacts.
summary.ko: An AI agent that accelerates investment research—screening, modeling, and coverage updates—by turning natural language into analyst-grade insights and artifacts.
summary.ja: 自然言語で指示するだけで、スクリーニングからモデル更新、決算要約、レポート作成までを自動化する投資リサーチ向けAIエージェント。

title.en: AIP Use Case: Investment Analyst AI Agent
